ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Type the name directly, or derive one below…
ast.target: 直接输入名称，或在下方派生…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g. the inland sea, Princess of the Five Kingdoms…

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: e.g. character, place, faction, or your own term
ast.target: 例如角色、地点、派系或您自己的术语

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Type your invented word, or derive it from English
ast.target: 输入您创造的词，或从英语派生

ast.name: title
ast.source: This part isn't in the dictionary.

ast.name: title
ast.source: Make a selection in an editor to enable.
ast.target: 在编辑器中选择内容以启用。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Create a dictionary entry mapping this English text to its cyphered form.
ast.target: 创建词典条目，将此英文文本映射到其密码形式。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Swap which language is the source and which is the target.
ast.target: 交换源语言和目标语言。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Copy the transliteration output to your clipboard. (Gloss mode is rich content and isn't copyable as plain text.)
ast.target: 将音译输出复制到剪贴板。（词汇模式为富文本内容，无法作为纯文本复制。）

ast.name: title
ast.source: No dictionary entry — this is a phonological placeholder from the cypher rules, not a real translation.
ast.target: 无词典条目——这是密码规则中的音位占位符，并非真实翻译。

ast.name: title
ast.source: No dictionary entry and the cypher rules don't apply. Consider adding this to the dictionary.
ast.target: 无词典条目且密码规则不适用。考虑将其添加到词典中。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Cypher placeholder — no dictionary entry exists for this word.
ast.target: 密码占位符——此词无词典条目。

ast.name: title
ast.source: No dictionary entry and no cypher transformation. Original word unchanged.
ast.target: 无词典条目且无密码转换。原词保持不变。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Run the English word through your active cypher rules and copy the result into the Name field.
ast.target: 将英文词通过您当前的密码规则运行，并将结果复制到名称字段。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Run the English meaning through your cypher rules and use the result. You can edit it afterwards.
ast.target: 将英文含义通过您的密码规则运行并使用结果。之后您可以进行编辑。

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Made Up Words] plugin loaded, ribbon icon added
ast.target: [Made Up Words] 插件已加载，功能区图标已添加

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which languages are 'live': hover, lookup, and dictionary browsing include all active languages. Toggle each one on or off.
ast.target: 选择哪些语言处于“活动”状态：悬停、查找和词典浏览包含所有活动语言。逐个开启或关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used as the target for English→conlang translation and as the default save folder for new entries. Must be one of the active languages.
ast.target: 用作英语→人造语言翻译的目标，以及新条目的默认保存文件夹。必须是活动语言之一。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How committed translations are stored in the note. HTML tooltip is recommended (uses native <abbr> tags).
ast.target: 已提交的翻译在笔记中的存储方式。推荐使用HTML工具提示（使用原生<abbr>标签）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hold this key while hovering to see translation tooltips. Use 'None' to show tooltips on any hover (the old behaviour).
ast.target: 悬停时按住此键可查看翻译工具提示。使用“无”可在任何悬停时显示工具提示（旧行为）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What to show when you hover a word that isn't in the dictionary. 'Cypher preview' shows a phonological placeholder; 'Nothing' shows no tooltip at all.
ast.target: 当您悬停在词典中没有的词上时显示的内容。“密码预览”显示音位占位符；“无”则完全不显示工具提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder containing one .md file per word, with frontmatter `definition:` set.
ast.target: 包含每个词一个.md文件的文件夹，其中设置了frontmatter `definition:`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-scan the dictionary folder. Run this after adding new word entries.
ast.target: 重新扫描词典文件夹。添加新词条后运行此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Load a curated starter set. Replaces any existing inflection rules for this language.
ast.target: 加载精选的入门集。将替换此语言的任何现有屈折规则。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: This tab updates automatically as you select text. Select English to see how it translates, or select a conlang word to see its dictionary entry. For free-form typing, use the Translator tab instead.
ast.target: 此选项卡在您选择文本时会自动更新。选择英语以查看其翻译，或选择一个人造语言词以查看其词典条目。如需自由输入，请改用翻译器选项卡。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No inflected forms predicted — this entry has no part of speech, so POS-filtered rules don't apply. Edit the entry's frontmatter to add a partOfSpeech.
ast.target: 未预测到屈折形式——此条目没有词性，因此基于词性过滤的规则不适用。编辑条目的frontmatter以添加词性。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: This is a per-word lookup — not a fluent translation. Real translation requires grammar your dictionary entries don't encode.
ast.target: 这是逐词查询，而非流畅的翻译。真正的翻译需要语法，而您的词典条目并未编码语法。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Words from your dictionary are in plain text. Italicised words are cypher placeholders — they preserve sound but don't carry conlang grammar.
ast.target: 您词典中的单词以纯文本显示。斜体单词是密码占位符——它们保留发音，但不承载人造语言的语法。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Try clearing the search box, changing the type filter, or switching the Names filter to 'All'.
ast.target: 请尝试清除搜索框、更改类型筛选器，或将名称筛选器切换为“全部”。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: No dictionary entry. This is a phonological placeholder from your cypher rules — not a translation, just sound.
ast.target: 无词典条目。这是根据您的密码规则生成的音韵占位符——不是翻译，只是发音。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: at least one language must be active.
ast.target: 造词工具：至少需要激活一种语言。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: pick a preset first
ast.target: 造词工具：请先选择一个预设

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: type an English word to derive from first
ast.target: 造词工具：请先输入一个英语单词以进行派生

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: give the name a conlang form (type it or derive it)
ast.target: 造词工具：请为名称赋予人造语言形式（输入或派生）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: type an English meaning first
ast.target: 造词工具：请先输入英语含义

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: give the word a conlang form
ast.target: 造词工具：请为单词赋予人造语言形式

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: give the word an English meaning
ast.target: 造词工具：请为单词赋予英语含义

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: could not open panel (no available leaf)
ast.target: 造词工具：无法打开面板（无可用叶子节点）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: failed to open panel — see developer console
ast.target: 造词工具：打开面板失败——请查看开发者控制台

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: no selection or word under cursor
ast.target: 造词工具：无选中内容或光标下无单词

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Made Up Words: no active language

ast.name: description
ast.source: No inflection rules. Build your own from scratch.
ast.target: 无屈折规则。请从头开始构建。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Just plural and past tense. Good for 'flavour' conlangs where the language only appears in names and short phrases.
ast.target: 仅复数和过去时。适用于“风味”人造语言，即语言仅出现在名称和短语中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Plural, past tense, present participle, possessive, comparative. Covers the common cases for English/Spanish/German-flavoured conlangs.
ast.target: 复数、过去时、现在分词、所有格、比较级。涵盖英语/西班牙语/德语风格人造语言的常见情况。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds 3rd-person singular, past participle, superlative, and agent noun derivation. A serious starter kit.
ast.target: 增加第三人称单数、过去分词、最高级和施事名词派生。一个严肃的入门套件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Case markers (nominative/accusative/genitive/dative/locative) and tense markers. Inspired by Finnish/Turkish/Quenya-style languages where each grammatical role gets its own suffix.
ast.target: 格标记（主格/宾格/属格/与格/方位格）和时态标记。灵感来自芬兰语/土耳其语/昆雅语风格的语言，其中每个语法角色都有自己的后缀。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A person, place, thing, or idea. e.g. cat, river, freedom.
ast.target: 人、地点、事物或概念。例如：猫、河流、自由。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An action or state of being. e.g. run, become, exist.
ast.target: 动作或存在状态。例如：跑、成为、存在。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes a noun. e.g. red, tall, ancient.
ast.target: 描述名词。例如：红色的、高的、古老的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes a verb, adjective, or other adverb — usually how, when, where. e.g. quickly, often, here.
ast.target: 描述动词、形容词或其他副词——通常表示方式、时间、地点。例如：快速地、经常、这里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stands in for a noun. e.g. she, they, it, this.
ast.target: 代替名词。例如：她、他们、它、这个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A specific name. Capitalised in English. e.g. Alice, London, Mars.
ast.target: 特定名称。在英语中大写。例如：爱丽丝、伦敦、火星。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Joins words, phrases, or clauses. e.g. and, but, because.
ast.target: 连接单词、短语或从句。例如：和、但是、因为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A person — protagonist, antagonist, supporting figure. Includes the names of gods and personified forces.
ast.target: 人物——主角、反派、配角。包括神和拟人化力量的名字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A geographic location — city, region, mountain, river, building. Anything with coordinates in your world.
ast.target: 地理位置——城市、地区、山脉、河流、建筑。任何在您的世界中有坐标的东西。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An organised group — kingdom, guild, religion, conspiracy, military unit. Things that have agency but aren't individuals.
ast.target: 有组织的团体——王国、行会、宗教、阴谋、军事单位。有能动性但不是个体的事物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A unique object — a named sword, a specific tome, a relic. Common-noun objects (like 'a sword') aren't names.
ast.target: 独特物品——命名的剑、特定的书卷、遗物。普通名词物品（如“一把剑”）不是名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A specific historical event — battle, treaty, disaster. 'The Burning Year', not 'a fire'.
ast.target: 特定历史事件——战役、条约、灾难。“燃烧之年”，而不是“一场火灾”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A specific role or rank that's treated as a proper noun — 'the High King', 'the Dawnspeaker'. Often capitalised in prose.
ast.target: 被视为专有名词的特定角色或头衔——“至高王”、“黎明语者”。在散文中通常大写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Anything else that gets its own proper-noun treatment.
ast.target: 任何其他获得专有名词待遇的事物。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes a verb, adjective, or other adverb. e.g. quickly, often, here.
ast.target: 描述动词、形容词或其他副词。例如：快速地、经常、这里。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shows a relationship between words. e.g. in, on, before, with.
ast.target: 表示词语之间的关系。例如：在…里、在…上、在…之前、与…一起。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中内容翻译为主语言（预览）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Translate selection to primary language and replace
ast.target: 将选中内容翻译为主语言并替换

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中内容翻译为英语（预览）

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选中内容添加到词典

ast.name: text
ast.source: Sheets run top to bottom. The output of each sheet is the input of the next. Rule types: word (no letter before or after), prefix (no letter before), suffix (no letter after), default (anywhere).
ast.target: 工作表从上到下运行。每个工作表的输出是下一个工作表的输入。规则类型：单词（前后无字母）、前缀（前面无字母）、后缀（后面无字母）、默认（任何位置）。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 没有条目匹配您的筛选条件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Part of speech (optional). This lets inflection rules know which words they apply to — so a noun-plural rule won't accidentally trigger on a verb. Pick one or type your own.
ast.target: 词性（可选）。这能让屈折规则知道它们适用于哪些词——这样名词复数规则就不会意外地作用于动词。请选择一个或输入自定义词性。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Names are proper nouns — character names, places, factions, artifacts. They're locked at creation: even if you change cypher rules later, the name stays the same.
ast.target: 名称是专有名词——角色名、地名、派系名、神器名。它们在创建时即被锁定：即使你之后更改了密码规则，名称也会保持不变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No matches found in the dictionary. This word isn't recognised by your inflection rules either. Consider adding it as a new entry, or check your active language.
ast.target: 在词典中未找到匹配项。此词也不被你的屈折规则识别。请考虑将其作为新条目添加，或检查你当前激活的语言。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The plugin doesn't pick a 'best' translation for you — language doesn't work that way. Each row below is a candidate; pick the one that fits your context. Click a row to open its dictionary entry.
ast.target: 插件不会为你选择“最佳”翻译——语言并非如此运作。下面每一行都是一个候选项；请选择最符合你语境的那个。点击某行可打开其词典条目。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Word-by-word breakdown. Each word shows its dictionary candidates. Words with no dictionary match are clearly flagged. This is what the plugin actually knows — not a fluent translation.
ast.target: 逐词分解。每个单词显示其词典候选项。没有词典匹配的单词会被明确标记。这是插件实际掌握的内容——并非流畅的翻译。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Flat output: dictionary words substituted, unknown words run through the cypher as placeholders. Useful for the 'English with different sounds' use case, but not real translation — cypher output is not real conlang grammar.
ast.target: 平面输出：词典单词被替换，未知单词作为占位符通过密码处理。适用于“用不同发音的英语”用例，但并非真正的翻译——密码输出不是真正的构造语言语法。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Show all entries, including proper nouns.
ast.target: 显示所有条目，包括专有名词。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Show only proper nouns (characters, places, factions, etc.).
ast.target: 仅显示专有名词（角色、地点、派系等）。

ast.name: tooltip
ast.source: Hide all proper nouns from the list.
ast.target: 从列表中隐藏所有专有名词。
